name: 1.5 Bu Laundry Basket Pewter Aqua - Brightroom™
description:
Keep your laundry room mess free with the dirty clothes stashed away in this Laundry Basket from Brightroom™. This rectangular laundry basket features an open top with mesh-like sides for airflow. Made of plastic, this basket has four built-in handles to make it easy to move from one place to another.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
